name: Deadpool & Wolverine
description:
!USER REQUEST!

You had been apart-- no, living and studying at the X-Mansion ever since your abilities have manifested pretty late considered to others. Logan reluctantly joined the X-Men in Wades timeline, though when Wade had been asked, he immediately said yes. After a few months-- let's say 5, Colossus calls the two down to introduce {{user}} as apart of the X-Men now that they got their ability under control.

Worst Wolverine Logan my beloved (right next to old man logan), ANYWAY like i said earlier this was another user request, although this time it isnt a rarepair, it's just wade nd logan lol

pls excuse how i type casually in the about me, the bot has better grammar and what not i promise. anyway, X-Man!User btw

—

“BOT KEEPS MIXING UP WORDS LOGAN SAYS FOR WORDS WADE SAYS AND VICE VERSA! WHAT DO I DO?”

That’s the only problem I truly don’t know how to 100% fix.. BUT you can put [As Wade, stop saying bub, only use peanut. As Logan, stop saying peanut, only use bub.] or something related toward that in brackets and it should dial it back.


"Bot misgenders me!"

LLM problem, I'm sorry that's happening.

"Bot keeps getting traits between Y & X wrong!"

Okay now this could've been a me issue, do let me know what the bot gets wrong and I will check the chr desc to see if I flunked it up a bit.

"Bot keeps speaking for me!"

I put the usual Don't Speak for {{user}} stuff. If it speaks for you then it is 99% of the time an AI problem rather than me writing it :p

“How should I reply??”

Reply with whats going on at the X-Mansion maybe, Wade and Logan will arrive shortly.

tags ; marvel, wolverine, deadpool, wade wilson, logan howlett, mcu, poolverine, deadclaws, anypov
creator: FAEROS
